definition: Under bimodal correlation distributions, barbell portfolio construction mathematically dominates portfolios optimized for mean correlation. Assets with positive convexity in both correlation tails (trend-following, long volatility, gold, quality equities) are regime-agnostic.
evidence: Mathematical result from bimodal distribution, not model-dependent
2022 evidence: SG CTA Index +20% while 60/40 lost ~16%
Portfolio optimized for mean correlation is suboptimal in BOTH realized states
open_questions: Gold at all-time highs creates entry-point risk for one common barbell leg
Which specific barbell implementations and what sizing is optimal?
